Quote present and value 256°C verbatim, but the quote header lists compounds 23 and 24 ('3-(Benzocumarin-3'-yl)-pyrazole' and its 1-phenyl analog); mp 256°C in the quote belongs to 'Compound 25' (a different compound), not compound 23 which has mp 235°C; compound_name '3-(Benzocumarin-3'-yl)-pyrazole' is compound 23, but the value 256°C belongs to compound 25 — there is a label/value mismatch.
